Article Title: DC vs GT: What was David Miller thinking — why didn’t he run?
Article Text:
Delhi Capitals' David Miller and Kuldeep Yadav after losing by one run vs Gujarat Titans. (Pic credit: IPL)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Watch Sameer Rizvi on batting approach: simple mindset, big impact for DC Sameer Rizvi on batting approach: simple mindset, big impact for DC

Finisher without the finish

Poll Did the penalty for a slow over rate impact the match result? Yes, it helped DC's chances No, they lost due to their own mistakes

NEW DELHI: 'What was he thinking?'. 'What was he doing?'. 'Why didn't he run?' These were some of the questions that did the rounds in the aftermath of Delhi Capitals' one-run loss against Gujarat Titans in the ongoing IPL 2026.The 'he' in question is David Miller . The South African batter had a whirlwind experience at the Arun Jaitley Stadium on Wednesday.First, while fielding, he picked up an injury on his right hand when he made a dive on the practice pitches to stop a Sai Sudharsan cover drive.Having tried to brush that off, he came to bat but the effects of it became far too clear just 10 balls into the 211-run chase. The blow had already been further exacerbated when he dived to make the crease.At that juncture, DC were 130/3 and needed 81 from 42 balls with KL Rahul well set on 69 from 37 balls. When Miller re-appeared, DC had just lost Tristan Stubbs to a run out and the equation on the scoreboard read: 51 needed from 20 balls. Three balls later, Rahul went for a well-outside-off-ball from Mohammed Siraj and the inside edge was lapped easily by keeper Jos Buttler.The onus and weight of responsibility had suddenly shifted towards the tattered and bruised 36-year-old Miller.He added only 6 from 3 balls upon resumption of his innings as the required rate ballooned to 18.00. And that is where the game turned.Miller hit 6, 4 and 6 off Mohammed Siraj, with the pacer conceding 23 runs in the penultimate over to bring the equation closer. It helped further that GT were penalised for a slow over rate, forcing an extra fielder back into the circle.13 needed from 6 became 8 from 3 balls when Miller got his chance in the final over. Next ball, Prasidh Krishna came around the wicket, bowled into the arc and was duly punished with the resultant six landing in the third tier of the stadium. A massive 106 metre hit!Then came the moment which baffled everyone and will be discussed for weeks at end. A pull shot went towards deep square leg and Miller refused a single with DC needing 2 from 2 balls. Had they completed that safe run, Kuldeep Yadav would have been asked to finish things off or at the very least force a Super Over.Instead, as Prasidh bowled a smart last ball under pressure, DC were unable to add to their tally and were instead caught one run short.A few days ago, as Punjab Kings chased down 210 runs against Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk, CSK head coach Stephen Fleming claimed there is no room for finishers in T20 anymore.“Look, I don’t think there is a thing called finishers anymore. It’s right from ball one, everyone is going at a rate of knocks. It’s not ‘build up to the 16th over and then go harder’. Everyone’s going hard from ball one. So the run rates of 10, 11, 12 all the way through are what’s expected and you’re not really getting the big peaks towards the end," he said.The DC chase, albeit unsuccessful, disproved that theory. If Delhi Capitals were scoring at 10.5 runs an over in the powerplay and 8.77 in the middle, they upped the ante to 13.40 in the final five overs. The 16th over went for 16 runs and Siraj's 19th produced 23 runs - the joint-highest of the night.Back to the question on Miller's decision to not run and no one had a fitting answer. Gill believed they had a "chance to win." DC skipper Axar Patel said things could have gone either way. "I think, this type of close game, you can, you know, point out anything. So I think, yes, we played very good cricket. As I said earlier, in a close chase, in a close game, you can point out a lot of things. But I think in the chase, I think we could have played smarter," said Axar.DC opener Pathum Nissanka didn't divulge much when he said, "We haven’t discussed it yet, but sometimes it happens in cricket," in the post match press conference. Rashid Khan , the Player of the Match, was quite pleased that he wasn't in Miller's shoes at that moment.What was going through Miller's head can only be best explained by him. One can only hazard a guess from the outside. But on the inside, DC would rue this golden opportunity lost.
Article Summary: Delhi capitals lost by one run to gujarat titans in the ipl 2026. David miller hit 6, 4 and 6 off mohammed siraj, with the pacer conceding 23 runs in the penultimate over to bring the equation closer. Miller refused a single with dc needing 2 from 2 balls. Dc skipper axar patel said things could have gone either way.

Article Title: Nfl Trade Rumors: NFL Trade Rumors: Carolina Panthers linked to surprising QB visit that could shake up depth chart
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Carolina Panthers linked to surprising QB visit that could shake up depth chart (Getty)

NFL trade rumors: Panthers take a closer look at Diego Pavia after standout SEC season





The latest round of NFL trade rumors has quietly put the Carolina Panthers in focus again. This time, it is not a blockbuster deal but a smart, low-risk move that could shape their depth chart. A college quarterback is in town, and the timing makes this one worth watching.As teams fine-tune their rosters ahead of the 2026 season, visits like these often hint at deeper plans. The Panthers already have a young starter, but this move suggests they are not done building that room.According to NFL insider Ian Rapoport, Vanderbilt quarterback Diego Pavia visited the Panthers. The update adds fresh context to the ongoing NFL trade discussion surrounding Carolina’s quarterback plans.Pavia is coming off an impressive 2025 campaign with the Vanderbilt Commodores. The star threw for 3,539 yards and 29 touchdowns while completing more than 70 per cent of his passes. That kind of efficiency in the SEC does not go unnoticed. It also earned him First-Team All-SEC honours, placing him among the top performers in one of college football’s toughest conferences.His journey makes his case even more interesting. Before coming to Vanderbilt, Pavia played at New Mexico Military Institute and then at New Mexico.He worked his way up, improving each season and adapting to higher levels of competition. That steady rise often appeals to NFL teams looking for quarterbacks who can develop over time.There is, however, one concern that continues to follow him. At the NFL Scouting Combine, Pavia measured under 5-foot-10. That has made some teams hesitant, especially those that prefer prototypical size at the position. Still, the Panthers might not view this as a major issue.Carolina already starts Bryce Young, who faced similar questions about size before entering the league. The franchise has shown it values traits like accuracy, decision-making, and poise over physical measurements alone. In that sense, Pavia fits the mould of a developmental option that could thrive in the right system.This visit does not guarantee that the Panthers will draft or sign him. However, it clearly signals intent. The team wants to create competition behind Young and ensure it has reliable depth in case of injuries or performance dips.Across the league, these kinds of visits often fly under the radar. Yet they can turn into smart additions that pay off later. For the Panthers, bringing in a productive and battle-tested quarterback like Diego Pavia could be a low-risk move with real upside.
Article Summary: Carolina panthers linked to surprising qb visit that could shake up depth chart. Diego pavia is coming off an impressive 2025 campaign with the vanderbilt commodores. The star threw for 3,539 yards and 29 touchdowns while completing more than 70 per cent of his passes.

Article Title: “It ain’t that exciting”: Warriors' Draymond Green makes candid admission about tanking fix ahead of play-in tournament
Article Text:
Draymond Green. Image via: Getty Images

Draymond Green on tanking and play-in tournament



Draymond Green. Image via: Robert Edwards-Imagn Images

Draymond Green calls out the Kings



How hard is it to fix tanking in the NBA? Warriors star Draymond Green has recently floated the idea of minimizing the tanking issue that the league has been trying to fix for quite a while. The debate around tanking refuses to fade, and Green is no longer tiptoeing around it. Speaking after the Golden State Warriors edged past the Sacramento Kings 110-105, Green questioned the system. Also, he challenged the NBA to act with the same urgency it often shows when disciplining players.His frustration also extended to the Play-In format itself, a concept once praised for keeping teams competitive into the season. For Green, the reality now feels different.Draymond Green’s message was blunt. Tanking, he believes, is not just happening. It is happening openly, without meaningful consequences. “I think I get fined when I do wrong,” Green said. “Just fine the hell out of people. We love taking money from players, keep fining the teams. I’ve seen two fines. And we all know everybody tanking. But you’ve seen two fines.”His frustration ties back to recent penalties handed to the Utah Jazz and Indiana Pacers. To Green, those actions barely scratch the surface. “If it was players (the league) would have snatched that money in a heartbeat,” he continued. “Why isn’t it the same?”The Play-In Tournament, once introduced to discourage losing, no longer convinces him.“I think it worked initially, and now to have a team stuck in 10th, it ain’t working,” Green said. “So we could have lost our last 15 games and been stuck in 10th, it ain’t working.”He didn’t hide his personal feelings either. “You go on the road in a game that you need to win I think, as a competitor, you’re going to rise to the challenge,” he said. “But I’m not going to sleep (Wednesday) night like, man, we got this Play-In next week, I got to get my rest. Nah, it ain’t that exciting.”Green further pointed to a moment late in the game that raised eyebrows. With just over three minutes left, Doug McDermott fouled Seth Curry despite the Warriors already being in the bonus.“I saw a team tonight foul Seth Curry with three minutes to go in a game for no reason. In the penalty,” Green said.Curry, one of the league’s most reliable free-throw shooters, converted, and the Warriors never looked back. The sequence is now under review, though Sacramento has maintained it was a miscommunication involving a timeout attempt by coach Doug Christie.Green was not convinced it was that simple. To him, it reflected a pattern. “We all know everybody tanking. But you’ve seen two fines… If my math serves me correctly that’s 10 that ain’t been fined.”Of course, the NBA is looking for solutions, but it would be interesting to see whether the league is willing to treat teams the same way it treats its players.
Article Summary: Golden state warriors star draymond green questioned the nba's tanking policy. Green said the nba should act with the same urgency it does when disciplining players. The play-in tournament, once introduced to discourage losing, no longer convinces him.

Article Title: Leon Draisaitl: Edmonton Oilers face uncertainty as Leon Draisaitl's appearance remains doubtful on playoff opener and beyond
Article Text:
Leon Draisaitl was one of Germany’s flagbearers for the Milan Cortina opening ceremony (Image Via Twitter)





Leon Draisaitl may not be ready for the playoffs as the Oilers forward remains sidelined due to injury

Watch POST-RAW | Kris Knoblauch 04.07.26 POST-RAW | Kris Knoblauch 04.07.26

As the Edmonton Oilers begin their Stanley Cup playoff campaign, star forward Leon Draisaitl could miss the playoffs due to his lower-body injury. According to head coach Kris Knoblauch, Draisaitl “may not be ready” when the playoffs open, casting uncertainty over his availability for Game 1. The forward has been out since March 15 with a lower-body injury, and Hyman could play before the regular season ends.According to the NHL, in 65 games played, Draisaitl has 35 goals, 62 assists, and 97 points in total. Earlier, Draisaitl had 33 points (11 goals, 22 assists) in the playoffs last season and 31 points (10 goals, 21 assists) in 2024.Recently, his performance garnered attention, as he scored two goals and three assists in a 5-4 overtime win against the Ottawa Senators on March 3, 2026, which was his seventh game in the NHL with at least five points. Edmonton Oilers star forward Leon Draisaitl may not be ready when the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs begin, as he remains sidelined from the team due to his injury. This was announced by Edmonton Oilers coach Kris Knoblauch on Monday. Head coach Kris Knoblauch stated that Draisaitl “may not be ready” for the playoffs, raising concerns over Edmonton’s lineup that is heading into a crucial stretch of the season.Speaking about Leon Draisaitl’s injury update, Kris Knoblauch told NHL, “Leon is going to be on the ice this week, and I don’t anticipate him playing any games in the regular season, and in the playoffs, sometime in the first round if things go well.He further added, “I’m not ruling that out (first game of the playoffs), but I would just anticipate sometime in the first (round). There’s a period of time we anticipated his return, and we said it was going to be right around the end of the regular season, at the start of the playoffs.”Draisaitl has been out of action since mid-March after sustaining the injury, and there is still no definitive timeline for his return. While the Oilers have not ruled him out entirely, the lack of clarity suggests the team may have to navigate the early stages of the postseason without their leading offensive team members.It is to be noted that the Oilers currently have four regular-season games remaining before the postseason begins. They are tied for first atop the Pacific Division with the Vegas Golden Knights but have yet to clinch a playoff berth.
Article Summary: Edmonton oilers head coach kris knoblauch said leon draisaitl “may not be ready” for the playoffs. The forward has been out since march 15 with a lower-body injury. In 65 games played, he has 35 goals, 62 assists, and 97 points in total.

Article Title: Stefanos Tsitsipas: Stefanos Tsitsipas shifts focus after Monte Carlo Masters loss as girlfriend Kristen Thoms birthday post grabs attention
Article Text:
Stefanos Tsitsipas (Image Via Getty)

Stefanos Tsitsipas moves past Monte Carlo loss to celebrate Kristen Thoms while ranking drop looms

It was a difficult week on court, but off court, Stefanos Tsitsipas chose a very different moment to share. Just after his early exit at the Monte Carlo Masters, the Greek star showed up for his girlfriend Kristen Thoms’ 29th birthday. Instead of focusing on the loss, he shared a softer side of his life through a few simple pictures.Tsitsipas posted a selfie with Thoms and also shared a photo of her birthday cake, which had a tropical theme and the name “Kirsten” written on it. Along with the picture, he wrote, “Keep God first in your life and you’re bound to prosper. Happy Birthday.” The timing of the post stood out. It came right after his opening-round defeat in Monte Carlo, showing how he quickly shifted his focus from tennis to personal life.The loss in Monte Carlo was not an easy one. Tsitsipas, who has won this tournament three times in the past, was knocked out in the first round by Francisco Cerundolo. For a player who once dominated this event, the result felt like a step back.His 2026 season has been up and down so far. After this defeat, his record stands at 11 wins and 7 losses. Because he was defending points from last year’s quarterfinal run, this early exit will cost him heavily.He is expected to lose 190 ranking points, which could push him down to around No. 65 in the ATP rankings.Still, away from the pressure of rankings and results, Tsitsipas looked calm during the birthday celebration. His relationship with Thoms became public earlier this year when the two shared pictures from a trip to Namibia. Since then, she has been seen supporting him during tournaments, including the Miami Open, where he picked up a strong win over Alex De Minaur.Before this relationship, Tsitsipas was linked with Paula Badosa. The two were together for a while but went their separate ways in July last year. Later, during a quick Q and A session, Tsitsipas openly said he prefers dating someone outside tennis. He explained that when both partners play the same sport, competition can quietly enter the relationship.Looking ahead, Tsitsipas will now try to reset his season. He is expected to play next in Munich, followed by the big clay events in Madrid and Rome. These tournaments will be important for him to rebuild confidence and climb back up the rankings. For now, though, this moment was not about wins or losses. It was about showing up for someone important in his life.
Article Summary: Stefanos tsitsipas showed up for girlfriend kristen thoms' 29th birthday. The greek star was knocked out in the first round of the monte carlo masters. He is expected to lose 190 ranking points, which could push him down to around no. 65.

Article Title: Weston Mckennie: From Outcast to Star: Weston McKennie Is the USMNT's Most Important Player This Summer
Article Text:
Weston McKennie with Juventus in the Serie A

Weston McKennie’s Career Has Been Defined by Comebacks

The 2026 World Cup is coming to the United States this summer, and Weston McKennie wants the world to know exactly who he is. Not the player who was surplus to requirements at Juventus. Not the midfielder who had a forgettable Copa América in 2024.No, this time, he wants to be just himself, a normal guy from Texas who happens to be in the form of his life at exactly the right moment. McKenzie is set to be one of the faces of the biggest sporting event on the planet, and the weight of a host nation's expectations is settling firmly on his shoulders.McKennie's journey to this point has been anything but straightforward. Since joining Juventus from Schalke 04 in 2020, he has repeatedly been written off, only to force his way back. He was loaned to Leeds United in 2023.He was nearly sold in successive summer windows. New Juventus boss Thiago Motta attempted to include him in a swap deal with Aston Villa, which McKennie rejected outright. The 27-year-old's response each time has been the same. He plays. He fights. He refuses to go away."I think the perception that I want people to have of me is that I'm a normal guy," McKennie told GOAL."I'm someone who likes normal things." The problem, if you can call it that, is that nothing about this summer will be normal.This season, under head coach Luciano Spalletti, McKennie has produced the finest football of his career. He has scored eight goals and contributed five assists in 36 appearances, earning Juventus' Player of the Month award for January after three goals in seven matches.On March 2, Juventus rewarded that form with a new contract through 2030, ending years of uncertainty about his future in Turin. He has featured at central midfield, fullback, wing, and even center forward under Spalletti, cementing a reputation as one of European football's most versatile midfielders.For USMNT coach Mauricio Pochettino, McKennie is a near-certain starter this summer. With Christian Pulisic managing fitness concerns and Giovanni Reyna still inconsistent, McKennie's energy, experience, and current form make him indispensable to the American cause.His Copa América struggles two years ago left a mark, however. Critics questioned his fitness, his sharpness, and his suitability for the biggest stages. McKennie has answered those questions emphatically at the club level.The World Cup, which gets underway on June 13 when the United States faces Paraguay, will be his chance to answer them on the grandest stage of all. He has never been more ready.
Article Summary: Weston mckennie is set to be one of the faces of the 2026 world cup. The midfielder has been written off several times, only to force his way back. The 27-year-old has scored eight goals and contributed five assists in 36 appearances.

Article Title: Taylor Swift Wedding Plans: Taylor Swift’s wedding plans take a hit as she faces a major setback while Travis Kelce remains distant
Article Text:
Taylor Swift’s wedding plans take a hit as she faces a major setback while Travis Kelce remains distant

Taylor Swift has been sued, just days before she walks down the aisle to the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce



Taylor Swift’s focus is on her wedding as Travis Kelce stays busy with work



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are just days away from tying the knot after being together for over two years.While the high profile couple continue to maintain strict privacy around their high profile wedding, the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift, has faced a massive setback in her life.A few days ago, as per E! News, Las Vegas cabaret artist Maren Wade, sued Taylor Swift for trademark infringement concerning her most recent album, “The Life of a Showgirl”.As per reports, Maren Wade has had the trademark on the title, “Confessions of a Showgirl” since 2015.It all started in 2014 when she had launched a column around it, which later grew into a podcast and a live performance tour.While the billionaire pop star Taylor Swift has remained silent about it, the lawsuit seems to have taken a turn for the worse.On 7th April, Las Vegas cabaret artist Maren Wade reportedly asked a Los Angeles federal court for an immediate injunction.As per reports, if the court agrees to this, it could mean that Taylor Swift can no longer be allowed to sell any merchandise related to her twelfth album, “The Life of a Showgirl”.The hearing for the lawsuit has been scheduled in May as Taylor Swift has continued to remain publicly distant from the mess.The billionaire pop star’s legal team has also not issued any statements to the media as of now.For now, it seems all that Taylor Swift has been focusing on is planning her multi million dollar wedding to the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce.As per Heat World, a source has revealed that Travis Kelce has taken a backseat when it comes to planning their wedding since he reportedly believes that Taylor Swift can do a better job at it.This has led to Taylor Swift reportedly feeling “overwhelmed” as many details about their wedding have been leaked to the media.It also seems that Taylor Swift will not be releasing any new music in the next few months as her main priority is her lavish wedding to Travis Kelce.As per reports, immediately after getting married, Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce will be going on their honeymoon across continents.
Article Summary: Taylor swift’s wedding plans take a hit as she faces a major setback. Travis kelce has taken a backseat when it comes to planning their wedding. Taylor swift will not be releasing any new music in the next few months as her main priority is her lavish wedding.

Article Title: Davey Lopes: Los Angeles Dodgers legend Davey Lopes passes away at 80 after Parkinson’s disease fight
Article Text:
Davey Lopes (Image Via Getty)

Davey Lopes built a lasting legacy with the Los Angeles Dodgers and beyond

The baseball world is in shock after the passing of Davey Lopes, one of the most respected names linked to the Los Angeles Dodgers. The former second baseman and coach died at the age of 80 after complications from Parkinson’s disease. According to TMZ Sports, he spent his final days under medical care before passing away in Rhode Island, surrounded by his family.Lopes was not just another player in the league. He established his career during a period which fans still consider to be the best time in Dodgers team history. The starting part of his life was difficult to face, but he succeeded in using his time to achieve success after joining the major leagues. Over time, he became known for his sharp instincts, speed, and consistency on the field.Davey Lopes took time to reach the majors, making his debut at 27, which is later than most players. But once he got there, he made sure people noticed him. Playing mainly for the Los Angeles Dodgers, he became a key part of the team during the 1970s and early 1980s.He helped the Dodgers win two World Series titles and was selected as an All-Star four times.His speed on the bases stood out the most. Lopes recorded 557 stolen bases during his 16-season career, making him one of the most reliable base runners of his time. He also won a Gold Glove, showing his strength in defense.After his long run with the Dodgers, Lopes also played for the Oakland Athletics, Chicago Cubs, and Houston Astros. Even after retiring in 1987, he stayed close to the game.He began his coaching career with the Texas Rangers and Baltimore Orioles and San Diego Padres. In 2000, he took on a bigger role as the manager of the Milwaukee Brewers. Lopes gained respect throughout his baseball career because of his achievements yet his personal conduct also earned him respect.He dedicated himself to professional baseball for multiple decades by playing and coaching the sport. His story proves that dedication and perseverance enable people to achieve success starting from any point in their life. The baseball community mourns his death because it created a void that particularly affects Dodgers supporters who considered him a part of their team's identity.
Article Summary: Former second baseman davey lopes died at the age of 80 after complications from parkinson’s disease. He spent his final days under medical care before passing away in rhode island, surrounded by his family. Lopes became a key part of the los angeles dodgers during the 1970s and early 1980s, helping the team win two world series titles.

Article Title: Vanessa Bryant: Did Vanessa Bryant move on years after Kobe Bryant’s death? Truth behind the controversial dating rumors
Article Text:
Did Vanessa Bryant move on years after Kobe Bryant’s death? Truth behind the controversial dating rumors(Image via Getty Images)

Has Vanessa Bryant met someone new ever since Kobe Bryant passed away in 2020?

Kobe Bryant’s wife, Vanessa Bryant, breaks silence on the grief of losing her husband and daughter together

Kobe Bryant, the NBA legend and one of the most talented players in the world, was with his teenage daughter, Gianna “Gigi” Bryant, when the two passed away in a horrific helicopter crash in 2020.Though it has been more than half a decade since then, Kobe Bryant’s death has left a void in his family and in the hearts of his billions of fans around the world. Amid this, the NBA legend’s wife, Vanessa Bryant, has had to frequently face affair rumors.No, ever since Kobe Bryant passed away, his wife, Vanessa Bryant, has remained devoted to raising their three daughters alone.Over the last six years, though there have been fake dating rumors, Vanessa Bryant has never been spotted with any man in public, nor have there been insider sources spilling anything controversial about her personal life.To make matters worse, a few months ago, there were rumors of Kobe Bryant’s wife, the popular philanthropist Vanessa Bryant, was pregnant.This had sparked outrage among fans but Vanessa Bryant had quickly denied such rumors.However, that has not been the end of it. Every few months there are controversial rumors about Vanessa Bryant’s personal life even as she remains busy in continuing Kobe Bryant’s legacy and raising their three daughters, popular model Natalia, Bianka and Capri.A few years ago, in a heartbreaking interview with PEOPLE, the popular philanthropist Vanessa Bryant, opened up about how she has been dealing with the grief of losing both her husband and her teenage daughter together.Vanessa Bryant said, "I guess the best way to describe it is that Kobe and Gigi motivate me to keep going…”The popular philanthropist added, “They inspire me to try harder and be better every day. Their love is unconditional and they motivate me in so many different ways."The NBA legend’s wife, Vanessa Bryant, has also spoken about their three daughters as she said, "My girls help me smile through the pain…They give me strength."Vanessa Bryant added, "I want to make Kobe, Gigi, Natalia, Bianka and Capri proud."
Article Summary: Vanessa bryant has never been spotted with any man in public, nor have there been insider sources spilling anything controversial about her personal life. A few months ago, there were rumors of kobe bryant’s wife, the popular philanthropist vanessa bryant, was pregnant.

Article Title: Eugenie Bouchard: Eugenie Bouchard pulls off unexpected move by snatching Andre Agassi’s coach ahead of $1M Pickleball Slam 4 clash as fans react to bold decision
Article Text:
Eugenie Bouchard (Image Via Getty)

Eugenie Bouchard trains with coach Matt Manasse ahead of Andre Agassi showdown

The buzz around the upcoming Pickleball Slam 4 just got more interesting. Eugenie Bouchard is preparing in her own way, and fans quickly noticed something unusual. Just days before the big event in Florida on April 15, she shared a glimpse of her training. And it came with a twist that caught everyone’s attention.She was not just practicing. She was training with the same coach linked to Andre Agassi. With a $1,000,000 prize pool and a “Battle of the Sexes” format, this event already had hype. Now, with Bouchard’s move, it feels even more competitive. Bouchard, who moved from tennis to pickleball in 2024, will team up with Anna Leigh Waters. On the other side, Agassi will partner with James Blake. The matchup is fun on paper, but both sides clearly want to win.In a recent Instagram update, Bouchard gave fans a behind-the-scenes look at her training session with Matt Manasse. He is a well-known name in pickleball and has worked with top players like Simone Jardim and Ben Johns.Manasse himself shared the session and wrote, “I guess I’m just team @thepickleballslam! Great training session with @geniebouchard …more on this later in the week!”Bouchard reshared the post and added her own playful line.She wrote, “Stole @agassi’s coach.”The moment quickly spread online because of its timing. With the match just around the corner, fans saw it as a clever and slightly cheeky move. It also shows that Bouchard is taking her new sport seriously.During the session, she was seen in a black outfit with a mint green cap and shoes, holding a pink pickleball paddle. It was a relaxed look, but the focus was clearly on preparation.This comes during a fresh phase in her career. Bouchard stepped away from professional tennis in July 2025 after her final match in Montreal. Before that, she had a strong tennis journey, including reaching the Wimbledon final in 2014.Now, she is building a second career. Apart from pickleball, she has also joined broadcasting. Recently, she appeared as an analyst during Indian Wells, where players like Aryna Sabalenka and Elena Rybakina competed.As the Pickleball Slam 4 gets closer, all eyes will be on how this new pairing performs. With strong teammates, a high prize, and a bit of playful rivalry already building, the stage is set for an exciting match.
Article Summary: Eugenie bouchard shared a behind-the-scenes look at her training session with matt manasse. She was not just practicing, she was training with the same coach linked to andre agassi. The pickleball slam 4 is set to take place in florida on april 15.

Article Title: Mike Vrabel: New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel reportedly captured in viral Coldplay moment with NFL reporter Dianna Russini at luxury hotel
Article Text:
New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel captured in viral Coldplay moment with top NFL reporter Dianna Russini at luxurious hotel (Image via Getty: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini)

Patriots coach Mike Vrabel reportedly danced with NFL reporter Dianna Russini at luxury hotel in Arizona

Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel deny being spotted together, said they were with friends

Photos are misleading and lack essential context



New England coach and NFL reporter attend NFL Competition Committee meeting in Biltmore

First, it was a tech CEO and his company’s HR manager. Then, it was Miami Dolphins legend Jason Taylor and his wife, Monica Taylor. And now, it’s probably the New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel and top New York Times NFL reporter Dianna Russini. All three caught in a Coldplay moment.But somehow, it seemed the coach and the reporter were aware of the camera around them. They were comfortable with the way the photos were being taken. Did they intend to go that way? No idea.But the tech CEO/HR manager and the Taylors were caught off guard by the live camera, whereas Vrabel/Russini did not appear awestruck. Yes, they were caught. But they looked comparatively comfortable despite being spotted in a viral Coldplay cam moment-like situation.Correction: they looked so comfortable because they were probably unaware of the cameras surrounding them. There was a Page Six spy who spotted them together.Page Six’s Oli Coleman was the first to report it to cyberspace. The Super Bowl LX-appearing coach and the former SportsCenter anchor were spotted holding hands and hugging at a luxurious hotel Ambiente Sedona in Arizona. It is a boutique resort situated close to the Brins Mesa mountain range.The spy told the outlet that the duo, both married to other people, had breakfast on the hotel restaurant’s patio around 10AM on March 28. They then spent an hour at the pool, lounging side-by-side in a hot tub.The spy spotted the duo again in the evening on the private rooftop of the hotel’s bungalow. The spot offers a panoramic view of the state’s Red Rock formations. The rooftop is exclusive to two-person bungalows and costs around $2K a night.The photos obtained by Page Six show them hugging against a sunset-y background, with their fingers entwined as they faced each other. The spy said that they even danced together.The outlet tried to find out who they were accompanied by at the luxurious hotel. Both Russini and Vrabel said they were there with their friends and insisted their friends were not visible in the pictures. Russini’s source disclosed that she was at the hotel during a hiking trip with two female friends.Vrabel’s friend told the outlet that the coach drove up to Sedona for the day with another pal. Then they went to their own hotel, which was two hours away, after spending time with Russini and her friends.However, three separate witnesses told the outlet they did not spot anyone else with 50-year-old Vrabel and 43-year-old Russini. When the outlet asked the eyewitness if the coach visited the hotel with friends, the eyewitness said, “No, he was with a girl.” Also, the photos taken by Page Six from various locations during the day could only spot the duo, and none of their friends.This looks like a Coldplay moment, just from afar, and the duo is not aware. Anyhow, this is their personal matter. It could be an infringement of privacy, too… but when reasons come up like, “there with pals,” something smells fishy and sounds suspicious to many.Anyhow, speculations were put to rest by both of them.The coach told Page Six, “These photos show a completely innocent interaction, and any suggestion otherwise is laughable. This doesn’t deserve any further response.”The reporter told the outlet, “The photos don’t represent the group of six people who were hanging out during the day. Like most journalists in the NFL, reporters interact with sources away from stadiums and other venues.”Executive editor of The Athletic, Steven Ginsberg, said, “These photos are misleading and lack essential context. These were public interactions in front of many people. Dianna is a premier journalist covering the NFL and we’re proud to have her at The Athletic.”After Vrabel was spotted with Russini, he went to the Arizona Biltmore Hotel in Phoenix for the NFL Competition Committee meeting. Russini was among several NFL reporters at Biltmore. The media had access to owners, executives, and coaches.The duo was first spotted on-screen when Russini was covering the Tennessee Titans as her first NFL beat at ESPN in 2018. Vrabel was the Titans’ head coach at the time.As for their personal lives, the reporter has been married to Shake Shack executive Kevin Goldschmidt since 2020, whereas the coach has been married to Jen Vrabel since 1999.
Article Summary: New england patriots head coach mike vrabel captured in viral coldplay moment with top nfl reporter dianna russini at luxurious hotel. The super bowl lx-appearing coach and the former sportscenter anchor were spotted holding hands and hugging at a luxurious hotel ambiente sedona in arizona.

Article Title: Sophia Florsch: New Formula E team Opel signs German driver Sophia Florsch as Test and Development Driver
Article Text:
Opel signs German driver Sophia Florsch as Test and Development Driver. (Image credit: Instagram)

German racer Sophia Florsch joins Opel as Test and Development Driver



Opel on why Sophia Florsch fits the bill as Test and Development Driver



Formula E is set to welcome a new team next season as the series undergoes a major transformation with the introduction of GEN4 cars. Opel will be the newest entrant, and 25-year-old German racer Sophia Florsch has now been confirmed as their Test and Development Driver. Florsch has already excelled across multiple racing formats and is now eager to showcase her expertise in a Formula E car.Sophia Florsch was the youngest winner in the British Ginetta Junior Championship and has also made her mark in German Formula 4 and the FIA Formula 3 Championship. In addition, she has achieved success in the European Le Mans Series and the 24 Hours of Le Mans, as well as in the Deutsche Tourenwagen Masters (DTM).Speaking about securing the role at Opel, Florsch said, “Formula E is currently the toughest racing series in the world, and that is exactly where Opel and I are now competing together. The fact that a brand with 125 years of motorsport DNA is now stepping into a world championship is impressive. As a German driver, being part of this factory team is more than a privilege for me.”Florsch will make her first appearance with the team this month when it showcases its GEN4 car in France on 21-22 May.Praising the new car, which will go on track next season, she said, “The GEN4 car is a thoroughbred race car: over 800 hp, all-wheel drive, ultra-fast. I cannot wait to work closely with the engineers, understand this car and get the maximum out of it. Together, we want to show what true teamwork can achieve – delivering sporting success and winning the hearts of motorsport fans for Opel and Formula E. ”Commenting on Florsch’s signing, Opel Team Principal Jorg Schrott said, as per FormulaE.com: “With Sophia’s signing, we at Opel are sending a clear signal for the consistent promotion of young talent in electric motorsport. Her precise technical feedback, as well as her analytical approach in the simulator and on track, will play an essential role in the further development of our GEN4 package.”“At the same time, her fresh approach fits perfectly with our ‘OMG! GSE’ campaign, through which we present the emotional side of our all-electric high-performance models. We are combining targeted talent development with high sporting standards, thereby strengthening the visibility of a new generation in motorsport that blends performance with public presence,” he added.Also read: Exclusive interview: Edoardo Mortara shines for Mahindra Racing this season, says “important to keep your feet on the ground”
Article Summary: Opel signs german driver sophia florsch as test and development driver. 25-year-old has already excelled across multiple racing formats. She will make her first appearance with the team this month when it showcases its gen4 car in france.

Article Title: Fifa World Cup: Mexico's Two Hottest Strikers Are Outscoring Even Cristiano Ronaldo Ahead of the 2026 World Cup
Article Text:
Julian Quinones with Team Mexico against Belgium (Via Getty Images)

Julian Quiñones Is Hunting the Saudi Golden Boot



With the 2026 World Cup less than two months away, football's global scoring charts have thrown up a genuinely surprising picture. Two Mexican forwards are sitting above some of the most celebrated names in the sport, putting up numbers that demand attention regardless of where they are playing.Julián Quiñones and Armando González are not household names across Europe. But right now, they are outscoring some of the biggest superstars in global football, including Cristiano Ronaldo and Kylian Mbappé, in raw goals in the 2025-26 season.Quinones has been one of the most clinical strikers in world football this season. The 29-year-old has netted 26 goals in 24 appearances for Al-Qadisiya in the Saudi Pro League, sitting level at the top of the scoring charts with Ivan Toney.Only Harry Kane, who leads the European Golden Boot race with 31 Bundesliga goals for Bayern Munich, has more across all major leagues globally. The numbers put Quiñones firmly ahead of Ronaldo and Mbappé, both on 23 goals, and Haaland, who has scored 22 times for Manchester City.For a player who arrived in Saudi Arabia from Club América in June 2024 as the most expensive outgoing transfer in Mexican football history at $16 million, the return has been extraordinary.Born in Colombia, Quiñones completed his Mexican naturalization in 2023 and has since become a key figure for El Tri.His consistency in a league that attracts global scrutiny makes his tally difficult to dismiss. But while Quiñones has been making waves in the Middle East, Armando González has been quietly putting together a breakout campaign in Liga MX.The 22-year-old Chivas Guadalajara forward has scored 24 goals across competitions this season, including 12 in the Apertura to share the golden boot, and a further 12 in the current Clausura tournament with four more matches remaining.González bagged a brace against Pumas to crack the worldwide top four in the global scoring race and currently leads Liga MX outright. For a player who made his professional debut just five years ago and only registered his first senior club goal in July 2024, the rise has been rapid.He earned his first Mexico call-up less than six months ago, in November 2025, and scored on his second appearance, a 4-0 win over Iceland in February. But what makes these scoring streaks even more impressive is the fact that neither of the two strikers has yet booked a place in the World Cup Squad.While Quiñones and González have both produced for both club and country, head coach Javier Aguirre has yet to confirm his selections ahead of the tournament that kicks off in June across the United States, Canada, and Mexico.For a host nation carrying enormous expectations, the form of its two most prolific domestic forwards will be impossible to ignore for much longer.
Article Summary: Julián quiñones and armando gonzález are not household names across europe. But right now, they are outscoring some of the biggest superstars in global football, including cristiano ronaldo and kylian mbappé. Neither of the two strikers has yet booked a place in the world cup squad.

Article Title: Pokemon Champions: How to transfer Pokemon to Pokemon Champions using Pokemon HOME
Article Text:
Image via Nintendo

How to connect your Pokemon Champions account to Pokemon Home



Watch How to Transfer Pokémon Between Pokémon Champions & Pokémon HOME (Full Guide) How to Transfer Pokémon Between Pokémon Champions & Pokémon HOME (Full Guide)

How to select Pokemon for transfer within Pokemon Home?



First, you should select the Pokémon you want to transfer. As part of the same, navigate through your Home storage boxes and select the ones that you wish to send over. After you are done with the same, you can now close the Pokémon Home application and prepare to receive them in Pokémon Champions. To receive your transferred Pokémon, you must open the main menu and select the "Recruit" option. From the Recruit menu, select the specific option for transferring Pokémon from Pokémon Home. This will display the exact list of monsters you previously selected. Finally, select the Pokémon you want to actively "visit" or join your Champions roster and confirm the selection.

The release of Pokémon Champions has ended up bringing a brand-new competitive landscape to the beloved franchise. If you wish to maximize your roster from the get-go, your best bet would be to transfer your previously caught Pokémon across various generations directly into the new game. However, this transfer can only be initiated through Pokémon Home.By linking your accounts, you can easily move your strongest Pokémons and dominate the opponents. If you are unaware of the exact process, here is the complete guide to connecting your accounts and transferring your Pokémon from Home to Champions.To get started, you will have to connect your accounts. For the same, you must launch Pokémon Home on your Nintendo Switch and select the Pokémon Champions icon located in the bottom-right corner.Before transferring, it is mandatory to link your profiles across both titles. If you attempt to initiate a transfer directly within Pokémon Champions without connecting first, an error prompt will block the process.After clicking the Pokémon Champions icon within the Pokémon Home app, you will have to end up verifying that the displayed account details are correct. Once confirmed, your two games will be synced.The following are the detailed steps that will help you in transferring your Pokémon from Pokémon Home to Pokémon Champions:The transfer process is split to maintain the secure, centralized database structure of Pokémon Home. By forcing you to initiate the move from Home, Nintendo ensures that all metadata, stats, and origins of the Pokémon remain intact.This was all you needed to know about transforming your Pokémon from Pokémon Home to Pokémon Champions.
Article Summary: How to transfer your pokémon from pokémon home to pokémon champions. The transfer process is split to maintain the secure, centralized database structure of pokémon home. Before transferring, it is mandatory to link your profiles across both titles.

Article Title: Shedeur Sanders: Shedeur Sanders receives QB1 treatment at Cleveland Browns players report while Deshaun Watson faces criticism for TikTok video
Article Text:
Shedeur Sanders receives QB1 treatment at Cleveland Browns players report while Deshaun Watson faces criticism for TikTok video (Image via Getty: Shedeur Sanders and Deshaun Watson)

Cleveland Browns post Shedeur Sanders’ pic on Instagram while Deshaun Watson faces backlash for Maybach ride

Fans label Deshaun Watson wealthy bust and worst contract in professional sports

Two contrasts. Two variations. Two quarterbacks. But only one’s favored? That’s what the Cleveland Browns’ recent social media post suggests. Heavy Sports’ J.R. DeGroote brought this unique franchise trait to everyone’s notice. It was the team’s first voluntary offseason program.The Browns posted five sneak peeks into their offseason program. It had several players, including RB Quinshon Judkins, DT Michael Hall Jr., LBs Quincy Williams and Carson Schwesinger, CB Tyson Campbell, and WRs Isaiah Bond and Cedric Tillman. It even offered a teaser of their new head coach, Todd Monken.But when it came to their primary leader of the offense? The quarterback. There was no injured veteran Deshaun Watson . There was no Year 2 Dillon Gabriel. But instead! It featured Year 2 QB Shedeur Sanders. This has led several people to believe that Sanders could be Cleveland’s QB1 in 2026.There will be an open, high-stakes QB competition for the starter role among Watson, Sanders, and Gabriel. But the special treatment that Sanders received on the franchise’s social media?This leaves everyone wondering if the wind’s blowing toward the signal caller, who went 3-4 as a rookie starter last year. He recorded 1,400 yards, seven touchdowns, and 10 interceptions, and earned a 68.1 passer rating with a 56.6% completion rate.As opposed to Watson’s rookie stats with the Houston Texans: 1,699 yards, 19 touchdowns, and eight interceptions, with 269 rushing yards and two rushing touchdowns. He also finished with a 3-4 record as a starter in 2017 but posted a 103-passer rating and a 61.8% completion rate.Their rookie starter records are the same, but they’ve now reached a destination where they will be in an open competition for the QB1 role at Cleveland. Watson has not played since 2024. He was recovering from a second Achilles tear. He returned to practice in Dec. 2025.As of April 2026, he has been fully cleared to play. He even participated in their recently held first offseason workout program. But this little information and his absence from the Browns’ Instagram handle have led everyone to speculate on his grip over the QB1 role. So much so that MLFootball recently posted a TikTok video of the veteran driving a GLS Maybach.The video was posted exactly on the day the franchise’s offseason workout began. Even though he attended the program, the franchise did not share his presence on social media. Coupled with this video, fans were quick to notice his absence and criticize him for the Maybach ride. So much so that they are labeling him a bust.A post read, “worst contract in professional sports.” He signed a five-year, $230M contract in 2022. But in 2024, he tore his Achilles, and then there were prolonged absences. He had six starts in 2023. Seven in 2024. and zero in 2025. Another user called him “a very wealthy bust.” He has not played a single game last season. He will be competing for a starter role with a Year 2 player in the 2026 season.Before Watson, Cleveland had Baker Mayfield, who gave them a playoff appearance after 18 years. But then, just when Mayfield was getting better, he was traded to the Carolina Panthers after they’d already acquired Watson from the Texans.Anyhow, coming back to the veteran: there was someone among fans who asked about the Maybach TikTok video’s timeline, as to when it was posted. X’s artificial intelligence, Grok, replied that it was posted in 2026. The Sporting News’ Olamilekan Ajayi reported that when Cleveland’s voluntary offseason program opened in Berea, Watson posted a TikTok video of himself cruising in a GLS Maybach. Now, was he in attendance?ESPN’s Daniel Oyefusi said on 92.3 The Fan, “Deshaun is there right now. The word out there is that he would be there for the start of the offseason workout program. I saw him post that he’s in the building, on the indoor practice field. I’d expect to see Deshaun Watson, Shedeur Sanders, and I would think we would see Dillon Gabriel, although Todd Monken said he hasn’t seen him through the offseason. I don’t think that’s a big deal. ”
Article Summary: Shedeur sanders receives qb1 treatment at cleveland browns players report while deshaun watson faces criticism for tiktok video. Fans label watson wealthy bust and worst contract in professional sports. There will be an open, high-stakes qb competition for the starter role among watson, sanders, and dillon gabriel.

Article Title: Auston Matthews: TSN analyst Mike Johnson discusses Auston Matthews' commitment to Toronto Maple Leafs during uncertain NHL offseason period
Article Text:
NHL-Auston Matthews of the Toronto Maple Leafs (Credit: Getty Images)

Mike Johnson discusses Toronto Maple Leafs' Auston Matthews NHL future direction



The Toronto Maple Leafs' future is once again the subject of much discussion as the offseason angst intensifies. As the team and its management change, miss expectations and fan pressure mount, the speculation that surrounds the heart of the club, particularly captain Auston Matthews, is growing more heated in the league.With this clatter, some observations by Mike Johnson have made a significant contribution to the discussion. As rumors of a rebuild persist, what Johnson says could prove to dictate the next phase of the franchise could be the mindset of that of Matthews. Mike Johnson has revealed that Auston Matthews does not regret his stay with the Toronto Maple Leafs and is still out to win with the team. This view goes against mounting speculation that the star forward might be looking to exit the club should the club encounter an extended period of rebuilding.The Maple Leafs find themselves at a crossroads after a poor season that has made them miss the playoffs after 10 years. As the front office changes and leadership remains under question, the debate has moved beyond small changes of a few features to the fact that a more structural reset may be in the offing.Johnson noted that the choice made by Matthews will probably be relative to the direction of the team in the next two seasons.Two years left on his existing contract, the schedule is very much in line with the possibility of Toronto being able to re-establish itself as a competitor and not having to go into a long-term rebuilding cycle.Notably, Johnson pointed out that a complete rebuild might not fit with the career stage of Matthews. This puts an extra burden on the new management team of the Maple Leafs. Assuming that Matthews is dedicated, the organization cannot take a middle ground and clearly know what it is doing: either it needs to aggressively build around its core or take risky decisions that indicate a reset.In the end, it is the position of Matthews that serves as a stabilizing element in a highly unstable situation. As rumors abound, the insights given by Johnson are that the foundation is still there, at least not as yet.
Article Summary: Mike johnson says auston matthews does not regret his stay with the toronto maple leafs. This view goes against mounting speculation that the star forward might be looking to exit the club should the club encounter an extended period of rebuilding.

Article Title: Nfl Mock Draft: NFL Mock Draft 2026 first round: Players picked for Kansas City Chiefs, Baltimore Ravens, Tampa Bay Buccaneers, and Los Angeles Chargers
Article Text:
NFL Mock Draft 2026 first round: Players picked for Kansas City Chiefs, Baltimore Ravens, Tampa Bay Buccaneers, and Los Angeles Chargers (Image via Getty: Kansas City Chiefs logo, Baltimore Ravens logo, Tampa Bay Buccaneers logo, and Los Angeles Chargers logo)

Colton Hood for Chiefs and Kenyon Sadiq for Ravens

Jermod McCoy for Buccaneers and Blake Miller for Chargers

Chiefs mock draft picks 2026 for Round 1

Ravens mock draft prospects 2026

Buccaneers 2026 mock draft picks for first round

Chargers mock draft picks 2026

Two weeks from now, new players will be picked by 32 NFL teams. Pittsburgh will be hosting the 2026 NFL Draft from April 23 to April 25.For the past two months, several analysts have been pairing college football players with franchises. Now the time is here. With every passing second, each pick holds more and more value. Because the glass was tainted two months ago, with just two weeks left for the draft, the glass is clear.And so, analysts and predictors have started projecting one specific player for each team. Like Indiana Hoosiers quarterback Fernando Mendoza for the Las Vegas Raiders. Ohio State Buckeyes safety Caleb Downs for the New York Giants or the Kansas City Chiefs.Oregon Ducks safety Dillon Thieneman for the Minnesota Vikings. And Notre Dame Fighting Irish running back Jeremiyah Love for the Tennessee Titans. There are four more such players who have been strongly paired for four franchises. Let’s check them out.ESPN’s Peter Schrager picks Tennessee Volunteers cornerback Colton Hood for the Kansas City Chiefs. Despite having Jermod McCoy in the lineup opposite him, Hood had a highly productive last season.The 6-foot-1, 195-pounder recorded 77 total tackles [57 solo], 14 passes defended, one forced fumble, three interceptions, and one interception touchdown.Kansas City has lost three key players this offseason [Trent McDuffie, Jaylen Watson, and Joshua Williams], so they need to fill a huge gap. Hood will bring a pro-style mentality and a knack for being around the ball. He is also the nephew of former CB Roderick Hood, who played for the Philadelphia Eagles, Arizona Cardinals, and Tennessee Titans back in the mid- and late-2000s.ESPN’s Matt Miller has picked Oregon Ducks tight end Kenyon Sadiq for the Baltimore Ravens. Isaiah Likely left for the New York Giants this free agency. He will reunite with head coach John Harbaugh. As for Mark Andrews, he will be turning 31 this season.So, just as teams seek veterans to mentor rookies, they also probably rely on rookies for energy and salary cap relief. This is where an elite runner [4.39 speed] like Sadiq comes into play. He could become the fastest weapon for QB Lamar Jackson . The Oregon TE is an elite red-zone threat, and his high-effort blocking makes him a rare tight end who can be trusted in both run and pass situations.Yahoo Sports’ Nate Tice and Charles McDonald pick Tennessee Volunteers cornerback Jermod McCoy for the Tampa Bay Buccaneers. The 20-year-old CB is one of the youngest players in this draft class. He did not play last season while recovering from a torn ACL. However, ESPN’s Peter Schrager calls McCoy a legit No. 1 corner when healthy.His 2024 film shows he could be a top-flight NFL cornerback who has a lot of potential as a press-man corner. A press-man corner is someone who lines up in front of a wide receiver at the line of scrimmage to disrupt the timing of their route in man-to-man coverage.ESPN’s Peter Schrager picks Clemson Tigers offensive tackle Blake Miller for the Los Angeles Chargers. The Justin Herbert-led team faced many injuries in 2025. As a result, they may be looking to draft someone who is an iron man. That’s where Miller comes into the picture.He has started every game in the past four seasons at Clemson, for a total of 54 starts. Schrager calls him the quintessential Iron Man of this tackle class. He may provide depth behind Joe Alt and Rashawn Slator. He could be drafted in the first round at No. 22.Miami Hurricanes edge Rueben Bain Jr. [ESPN]LSU Tigers cornerback Mansoor Delane [SB Nation]Utah Utes offensive tackle Caleb Lomu [DAZN].Georgia Bulldogs offensive tackle Monroe Freeling [SB Nation]Penn State Nittany Lions guard Olaivavega Ioane [FOX Sports]Arizona State Sun Devils wide receiver Jordyn Tyson [ESPN].Texas Tech Red Raiders edge David Bailey [Buccaneers Wire]Georgia Bulldogs linebacker CJ Allen [ClutchPoints]Auburn Tigers edge rusher Keldric Faulk [First Things First].Washington Huskies running back Jonah Coleman [FanSided]Miami Hurricanes edge Akheem Mesidor [The Athletic]Texas Tech Red Raiders defensive tackle Lee Hunter [The Sporting Tribune].
Article Summary: Nfl mock draft 2026 first round: players picked for kansas city chiefs, baltimore ravens, tampa bay buccaneers, and los angeles chargers. Two weeks from now, new players will be picked by 32 nfl teams. Pittsburgh will be hosting the 2026 nfl draft from april 23 to april 25.

Article Title: Livvy Dunne: MLB star Paul Skenes’ girlfriend Livvy Dunne reveals getting rejected for HBO “The White Lotus” before landing iconic Baywatch role
Article Text:
Paul Skenes and Livvy Dunne (Image Via Getty)

Former gymnastics star Livvy Dunne talks about being nervous during her first audition



The former LSU gymnast and social media star Olivia Dunne has recently spoken about her first missed chance in Hollywood. The 23-year-old said she once auditioned for HBO’s popular show The White Lotus; however, she did not get the role. Even after this setback, Dunne stayed focused on acting. She has now secured an important role in the upcoming Baywatch reboot.Dunne said the audition was for the fourth season of the show. She admitted she felt nervous at first. However, she also said her gymnastics experience helped her to stay calm and composed. Over time, she kept giving auditions. She worked on improving her acting skills. Her hard work has now paid off with a role in a big TV project.Olivia Dunne told the Boardroom that her first audition was very different from anything she had done before. She felt worried about forgetting her lines and performing in front of casting directors. But she reminded herself that she had already performed in front of huge crowds as a gymnast. That gave her confidence to handle the tough moment.She also opened up on how doing gymnastics in front of thousands of people sometimes felt easier than acting in a quiet room.Still, she tried her best and gave her best shot. She revealed that she treated the audition as a learning experience. She did not see it as a failure. Instead, it motivated her to keep trying in acting.After that, Dunne attended more auditions, though most were online. She spent time learning scripts and understanding how the acting world works. Her efforts helped her land a role in the Fox reboot of Baywatch. She will play a junior lifeguard named Grace.The show will also feature actors like Stephen Amell and Brooks Nader. Dunne has already shared several behind-the-scenes moments in photos on her social media account, including shots of her in the famous Baywatch red swimsuit.In the future, Dunne said she might return to gymnastics. MLB star Paul Skenes' girlfriend retired from gymnastics in April 2025 at just 22 years of age after she incurred multiple injuries. For now, she is focused on acting and excited about this new chapter in her career.
Article Summary: Olivia dunne said she once auditioned for hbo’s popular show the white lotus. She did not get the role, but it motivated her to keep trying in acting. Her efforts helped her land a role in the fox reboot of baywatch.
